title: SonicWall Capture ATP Sandbox Verdict Summary (SonicWall)
spl:
index=netfw sourcetype="dell:sonicwall:firewall" earliest=-7d
| where match(_raw,"(?i)Capture ATP|sandbox|verdict")
| rex field=_raw "(?i)verdict[\s:]+(?<verdict>\w+)"
| stats count by verdict, file_hash
| sort -count
description: Sandbox verdicts classify zero-day payloads that signature AV misses. Tracking malicious vs benign ratios measures advanced protection ROI.
value: Prioritizes endpoint sweeps when sandbox returns malicious for widely emailed files.
implementation: Parse verdict, file hash, and submission channel. Auto-open tickets on malicious.

references.title: Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk
Splunk Connect for Syslog — Dell SonicWall reference

grandmaExplanation: Sandbox verdicts classify zero-day payloads that signature AV misses — we monitor SonicWall logs so teams can act before users feel pain.
